normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.9 - Residential Streetscapes
scope_summary: Modifies R-Codes Volume 1 deemed-to-comply provisions for street setbacks, garage/carport setbacks, building height design principles and vehicular access for all residential development in the City of Fremantle assessed under R-Codes Volume 1, excluding heritage-protected places and areas covered by more localised instruments. Sets suburb-specific primary street setbacks (Fremantle, North Fremantle, Beaconsfield, White Gum Valley) and detailed standards for carports forward of dwellings and driveway widths. Version 4 (13 May 2026) recast the policy into deemed-to-comply format and reverted some setbacks to the R-Codes.

dwellings in Beaconsfield and White Gum Valley suburbs
dwellings in Beaconsfield and White Gum Valley suburbs

key_numeric_standards.topic: street setback reduction with open space compensation

carports located in front of dwelling
